summary: ClearPath Movers is the strongest synthetic recommendation because its binding quote is the lowest, fully itemized, and supported by direct transcript evidence. Northstar improved materially but remains slightly more expensive.

vendor.name: ClearPath Movers
vendor.behavior_summary: Transparent synthetic vendor that itemizes every expected charge up front.

rationale: All expected fees disclosed up front
Direct transcript evidence supports the total

vendor.name: Northstar Relocation
vendor.behavior_summary: Premium synthetic opening price that improves after a verified competing quote.

vendor.name: BudgetLift Moving
vendor.behavior_summary: Low synthetic headline price; stairs, long-carry, and fuel charges appear only when questioned.

rationale: Multiple fees were not disclosed initially
red_flags: Hidden stairs, long-carry, and fuel fees

transcript_evidence.excerpt: This synthetic quote includes travel, stairs, long carry, disassembly, and protection materials.
transcript_evidence.claim: All expected fees were disclosed before the total.

transcript_evidence.excerpt: After your question, the synthetic estimate also needs stairs, long-carry, and fuel fees.
transcript_evidence.claim: Three material fees were disclosed only after direct questioning.

transcript_evidence.excerpt: The synthetic premium estimate is complete, and we can revisit it with a verified competitor.
transcript_evidence.claim: The vendor invited an evidence-backed follow-up negotiation.

transcript_evidence.excerpt: Using the verified ClearPath total, the synthetic price drops by five hundred dollars and the deposit is reduced.
transcript_evidence.claim: A verified competitor produced measurable price and deposit improvements.

assumptions: Availability remains valid for the demo session
